summary: The task is complete in substance. The repository has Prisma/SQLite dependencies, repo-local Prisma configuration, migrations, generated-client setup, and an idempotent seed path for a protected enabled echo endpoint. The schema covers endpoint identity/name/title/description/enabled state, ordered parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic endpoint/case failure config placeholders. The seed data is singular after repeat preparation, and docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented schema. The provided mandatory gates all passed; I did not rerun write-heavy gates because this evaluator environment is read-only, but I verified the current SQLite contents and implementation shape directly.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is implemented via scripts/db-prepare.mjs and applies Prisma migrations, generates Prisma Client, and runs seed defaults.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts and the current database contains one endpoint, one parameter, and two response cases for endpoint_default_echo.
prisma/schema.prisma can represent endpoint names, descriptions, enabled state, ordered parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md describes the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, ResponseCase, indexes, runtime database configuration, and seed defaults consistently with the Prisma schema.
Required command summary shows npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify passed.
